notes: Australian contents-restoration facility. Clean, careful, respectful salvage of water-damaged belongings — never distressing. Gloves always when handling contents. Items are damp/recovered, not destroyed or ruined. No on-image text or brand names.

images.context: Course hero image for 'Introduction to Recovery of Submerged Items and Contents'
images.prompt: A professional contents-restoration technician in gloves carefully lifting a water-damaged personal item, such as a damp hardcover book, from a padded stainless work bench in a bright, clean Australian restoration facility. Neat rows of labelled recovery bins and a dehumidifier in the background. Calm, careful, respectful handling. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no ruined or destroyed belongings, no dirty floodwater, no clutter or chaos

images.context: Module 3 — Initial Preservation: inventory and photographic documentation of salvaged items
images.prompt: Over-the-shoulder view of a gloved technician photographing and cataloguing recovered items laid out individually on a clean table in an Australian restoration facility, each item tagged and logged for its condition baseline. Bright, orderly, methodical documentation, tablet or clipboard in hand. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no legible document text, no ruined belongings

images.context: Module 3 — Creating Drying Conditions and Supplementary Packaging: desiccant and monitored dehumidification
images.prompt: Interior of a climate-controlled drying room in an Australian restoration facility where recovered contents rest on ventilated shelving with desiccant pouches placed between items, a dehumidifier and a hygrometer visible nearby. A gloved technician gently checks a drying item. Clean, controlled, gradual and gentle. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no legible gauge numbers, no ruined belongings, no mess
